ddls:
CREATE TABLE "monitoring_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each monitoring station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the monitoring station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the monitoring station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the monitoring station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the monitoring station */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the station was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Last date when the station was maintained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the station */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person for the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the monitoring station where the data was collected */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the data was collected */,
  "pm25" REAL /* Particulate matter (PM2.5) in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "pm10" REAL /* Particulate matter (PM10) in micrograms per cubic meter */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "wind_direction" INTEGER /* Wind direction in degrees */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in kilometers per hour */,
  "data_format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data format (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source (e.g., sensor, API) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset to track changes over time */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the data entry */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data (e.g., valid, suspect, invalid) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_data_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollutants" (
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollutant */,
  "pollutant_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollutant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pollutant */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement unit for the pollutant */,
  "min_safe_level" REAL /* Minimum safe level of the pollutant */,
  "max_safe_level" REAL /* Maximum safe level of the pollutant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollutant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pollutants_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES measurement_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor to a standard unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension for the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_data_collection_date" TEXT /* Last date when data was collected from this source */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_indexes" (
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality index */,
  "index_name" TEXT /* Name of the air quality index */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the air quality index */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code associated with the air quality index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("index_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "air_quality_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each air quality level */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollutant */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the air quality index */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the air quality level */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the air quality level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the air quality level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_levels_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES air_quality_indexes ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_air_quality_levels_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES air_quality_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "pollutant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollutant */,
  "index_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the air quality index */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_recipients" TEXT /* List of recipients for the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_index_id FOREIGN KEY ("index_id") REFERENCES air_quality_indexes ("index_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_pollutant_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollutant_id") REFERENCES pollutants ("pollutant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_logs" (
  "alert_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert log entry */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert setting */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Date and time the alert was triggered */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the monitoring station where the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the alert */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES alert_settings ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES monitoring_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "file_format_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the format of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_for" INTEGER /* ID of the user or team for whom the report was generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_file_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_for FOREIGN KEY ("generated_for") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
